name: Get List of Past Sold Prospects for an OpCo

content.query:
SELECT distinct
cst.CustomerID
,cst.Address1
,cst.City
,cst.[State]
,cst.Zip
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 ,[EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
 where 
 lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
 and lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
and lds.Division = 'PHI'
and dsp.Disposition = 'Sale'
